iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — MAJOR DE-ESCALATION. President Pezeshkian publicly set terms to end war: recognition of Iran's rights, reparations, firm international guarantees against future aggression. Al Jazeera: 'possible sign of de-escalation from Tehran.' First time Iran has laid out conditions for peace since war began. Hegseth claims new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is 'wounded and likely disfigured' — leadership decapitation ongoing. Nuclear rhetoric signal remains but overall trajectory sharply downward. Zone fix: 17→9, moves from elevated to deterrent.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — PEAK INTENSITY, DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS STRENGTHENING. Pezeshkian set war-ending terms (rights recognition, reparations, non-aggression guarantees) — first formal peace conditions from Tehran. KC-135 refueling plane crashed in Iraq (4 crew dead, not hostile per CENTCOM) — 4th US aircraft lost. French soldier killed by drone in Irbil, 6 wounded — first European military fatality. Macron calls it 'unacceptable.' New supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei 'wounded and likely disfigured' (Hegseth). Israel continues massive strikes. Pakistan-Afghanistan war ongoing but separate. Southeast Asia rationing energy due to Hormuz closure. Down from 69→61.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING. 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded in southern Lebanon (CNN). 687 killed in Lebanon including 98 children. Al Jazeera: 'More than two dozen killed in Lebanon as Israel attacks Beirut, south, east.' First strike on new area of Lebanon. WaPo: 'War expands into Lebanon.' CNN: 'The war that never ended — Israel seizes moment to finish Hezbollah.' Guardian: Struck center of Beirut + sweeping 25-mile evacuation order. IDF preparing expanded operations. Hezbollah+Iran launched attack on 50+ targets including Israeli bases. Up from 57→65.

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' NATO forces building up off Cyprus. Iranian drone hit UK base in Cyprus. No direct Turkish involvement. Stable.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan border buildup. Pakistan-Afghanistan war intensifying: Pakistan bombed Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar airport, Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of targeting homes (6+ civilians killed). China's special envoy mediating between Pakistan and Afghanistan. India condemned Pakistan earlier but no India-Pakistan military friction. Separate conflict. India-Pakistan tracker stable.

russia.notes: Russia calls on US/Israel to stop attacks and negotiate. Russia continues arms supply to Iran. No direct ME military involvement. Trump's Russia sanctions removal for oil supply shows pragmatic engagement. Putin envoy: 'US better understands importance of Russian oil amid energy crisis' — Russia profiting €6bn in fossil fuel sales in 2 weeks since war began. Stable/de-escalating.

china.notes: Chinese flights around Taiwan resumed March 13 after ~2-week pause. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale for Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict via special envoy Yue Xiaoyong. DPRK condemns US ME attacks — China notably silent on Iran war. No new escalation signals.

north_korea.notes: Kim Jong Un conducted cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon — flights of ~10,000 seconds (~2.8 hours) toward Yellow Sea. Kim attended with daughter Kim Ju Ae (touted as successor). Kim emphasized 'powerful and reliable nuclear war deterrent.' Foreign Ministry condemned US-Israel attacks on Iran. SCMP analysis: Iran-DPRK missile/nuclear cooperation 'highly likely' to revive post-war. No new signals this cycle. Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: Occupies ~20% Ukraine. ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck S-300V launcher, radar stations, ammo depots. Russia shot down two Storm Shadow missiles. Guardian: Ukraine-Hungary row deepens over Druzhba pipeline (Russian oil). Zelenskyy accuses Hungary of 'banditry' over seized gold/cash. Putin envoy says 'US better understands importance of Russian oil' — Russia earned €6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Russia benefiting from ME war energy disruption. Zone fix: 29→26, moves from critical to elevated.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION WATCH STRENGTHENING SIGNIFICANTLY. Major shift: Iranian President Pezeshkian publicly laid out formal peace terms — recognition of Iran's rights, reparations, and non-aggression guarantees. This is the first time Tehran has articulated conditions for ending the war. Previously Iran rejected ceasefire demands; now they're offering counter-proposals. Combined with Trump's 'war over soon' rhetoric and White House internal debate on exit strategy, two-sided de-escalation pressure is building. HOWEVER: Israel continues massive strikes, Katz says 'no time limit,' and IDF soldiers killed in Lebanon suggests expanding ground operations. New Supreme Leader Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured — leadership vacuum could go either way (more desperate or more willing to negotiate). Key watch: whether Pezeshkian's terms gain diplomatic traction, or whether Israel overrides US pressure to wind down.

latest_news.headline: Pezeshkian sets terms to end war: rights recognition, reparations, non-aggression guarantees
latest_news.text: Iranian President Pezeshkian posted on X that he spoke to Russian and Pakistani counterparts confirming Iran's 'commitment to peace.' Laid out conditions: recognition of Iran's rights, payment of reparations, and firm international guarantees against future aggression. Al Jazeera: 'possible sign of de-escalation from Tehran.'

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 'wounded and likely disfigured'
latest_news.text: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said at Friday press briefing that Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has been injured and is 'likely disfigured.' Leadership decapitation ongoing after Khamenei's father killed in early strikes.

latest_news.headline: KC-135 refueling plane crashes in Iraq, 4 crew dead — 4th US aircraft lost
latest_news.text: US KC-135 tanker crashed in western Iraq. CENTCOM says not result of hostile or friendly fire. Another KC-135 damaged but landed in Israel. 4th US aircraft lost since war began. Raises questions about operational tempo and strain on forces.

latest_news.headline: French soldier killed by drone in Irbil, 6 wounded — first European military fatality
latest_news.text: Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion killed in drone attack on Kurdish military base in Irbil region, Iraq. Six other French soldiers wounded. Macron called attack 'unacceptable' and said 'the war in Iran cannot justify' attacks on coalition forces.

latest_news.headline: 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Two Israeli soldiers killed and at least 14 wounded in southern Lebanon, per IDF. CNN: 'The war that never ended — Israel seizes moment to finish Hezbollah.' Ground operations intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan bombs Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar airport; Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of targeting homes
latest_news.text: Pakistan escalated strikes on Afghanistan, bombing fuel depot of private airline Kam Air near Kandahar airport. Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of targeting civilian homes — at least 6 civilians killed. China's special envoy mediating between the two. Separate from India-Pakistan.

latest_news.headline: Russia earned €6bn in fossil fuel sales in 2 weeks since war began
latest_news.text: Russia received €6bn from selling fossil fuels in the fortnight since the US-Israel war on Iran started. Putin envoy says 'US better understands importance of Russian oil amid energy crisis.' Russia benefiting from ME war disruption.

latest_news.headline: Southeast Asia shuts offices, limits travel as oil crisis deepens
latest_news.text: Countries across energy-hungry Asia rationing supplies and exports of fossil fuels due to Strait of Hormuz near-total shutdown. Southeast Asian nations implementing emergency measures including office closures and travel restrictions.

outlook: CRITICAL with SIGNIFICANTLY STRENGTHENING DE-ESCALATION WATCH: Day 14 — Two-sided pressure building. From Tehran: President Pezeshkian publicly set formal peace terms (rights, reparations, guarantees) — first time Iran has offered conditions rather than just rejecting demands. From Washington: Trump says war 'could be over soon.' Combined with White House internal tug-of-war on exit strategy. However: Israel continues massive strikes, IDF soldiers killed in Lebanon (ground ops expanding), Katz says 'no time limit.' New Supreme Leader Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured — leadership vacuum. KC-135 crash + French soldier killed raise coalition strain. Key watch: whether Pezeshkian's terms create diplomatic track, Israel's response to US wind-down pressure, Iran's next military move after setting terms, and whether leadership decapitation weakens or hardens Iranian resistance.
